title: Activity log - Ability to create graphs
excerpt: For reporting purposes, it would be interesting to be able to create charts/dashboard based on the activity log information, to analyze how the board is being used.

posts.author: JuanCar (Juan Carlos Garcia de la Corte)
posts.cookedHtml: For reporting purposes, it would be interesting to be able to create charts/dashboard based on the activity log information, to analyze how the board is being used.
